launcher.new_project.reline_models.comic: DeJPEG and restoration of color comics.
launcher.new_project.reline_models.dehal: Smooths halftone dots (dehalftone) and restores clean tones, with upscaling.

launcher.new_project.reline_models.dejpe: Restores an image damaged by JPEG compression.
Removes JPEG artifacts and ringing on B/W manga without resizing. The LQ/MQ/HQ variants target different source compression levels (LQ — heavy artifacts, HQ — light).
Match LQ/MQ/HQ to the quality of the source.
launcher.new_project.reline_models.descr: Removes the halftone grid (moiré) from scanned printed pages and upscales the image at the same time.
For scans of paper magazines with visible screen dots.
launcher.new_project.reline_models.digit: Upscale of color digital art. The _t/_l suffixes are tiny/large (speed vs quality).
Restoration and upscale of digital B/W manga.
launcher.new_project.reline_models.dwtp_: The powerful DWTP series: manga dataset cleaning (de-screen/downsample), artifact removal, and upscaling. The heavy variants (ATD/DAT2) give the best quality but are slower.
Strong restoration; heavy architectures love a GPU.
launcher.new_project.reline_models.enhan: Restoration of color manhwa and digital art on the SMoSR architecture (by Umzi). Very fast: ≈0.5 s versus ~1.5 min for the heavy DAT2 on an RTX 3060. A bit noisier and more artifact-prone than FIGSR, but many times faster. Requires resselt ≥ 1.4.0.
When you need fast restoration of color art/manhwa.
launcher.new_project.reline_models.halft: A model that works with the halftone screen (screentone) — synthesizing or correcting the dot grid.
launcher.new_project.reline_models.illus: Flagship for color illustrations and digital art: maximum detail (DAT2) or faster (ESRGAN).
The best choice for color illustrations and webtoons.
launcher.new_project.reline_models.manga: Flagship for B/W manga: restores the line and screentone, suppresses JPEG artifacts, upscales ×4. The 1200p…2048p variants are matched to the source page height.
The best choice for B/W scans; pick the variant matching the page height.
Upscale of B/W manga while keeping the line sharp.
launcher.new_project.reline_models.purep: Upscale of photos (span — faster, compact — very fast).
launcher.new_project.reline_models.reale: Classic general-purpose upscaler ×4. The anime variant is for anime/artwork.
launcher.new_project.reline_models.realw: Restoration of "dirty" web photos with artifacts (ATD/DRCT-L — heavy, best restoration).
For compressed photos from the internet.
launcher.new_project.reline_models.span_: Beta of the light SPAN v2 upscaler.
launcher.new_project.reline_models.spanp: Fast, light general-purpose upscaler. The _s/_st suffixes are small/small-tiny.
launcher.new_project.reline_models.ultra: General-purpose mixes: Balanced, Restore (restoration focus), Smooth (smoothing).
launcher.new_project.reline_models.unkno: The purpose could not be determined from the name.
launcher.new_project.reline_models.unnam: Raw training weights (name = iteration number only). The purpose cannot be determined from the name — use at your own risk.
launcher.new_project.reline_models.wtp_r: The WTP manga-restore series: cleaning and restoration of B/W manga (line, tone) without upscaling.
launcher.new_project.reline_models.wtp_s: The WTP manga-scale series: upscaling of B/W manga.
launcher.new_project.reline_models.wtp_u: General-purpose WTP restorer for B/W manga.

launcher.tutorial.export_chapter_message: Packs the chapter into a .mschapter to hand it off to another translator.
launcher.tutorial.import_chapter_message:
Imports a ready chapter from a .mschapter or .psd file.

You can import an already-cleaned chapter directly from a zip or rar.
launcher.tutorial.new_chapter_message:
A full-featured toolkit for downloading and preprocessing chapters:
- Simply opening an already downloaded chapter
- Quick downloading from specific sites
- Advanced downloading in various ways from a controlled browser
- Stitching and slicing of a webtoon ribbon
- Noise removal and upscaling via Reline and Waifu2x
- Can be used just for downloading and processing chapters, without necessarily saving them as a project

launcher.tutorial.settings_message: Projects folder, AI backend, compute devices, and this tutorial — all here. You can replay any tip from the "Tutorial" tab.

settings.canvas_ribbon.aside_compact_mod:
While the bubble is not focused, only the original and translation lines are shown.

settings.canvas_ribbon.aside_compact_non: The full bubble interface is always shown
settings.canvas_ribbon.aside_compact_str:
While the bubble is not focused, only the translation line is shown. Or the original, if the translation is empty.
When the bubble is focused, it expands, showing both lines, buttons, number, and character.
settings.canvas_ribbon.aside_second_colu:
When there is enough room beside the ribbon for both columns to fit entirely on screen, the side bubbles on that side are laid out in two columns: the one nearer the ribbon and the far one. The mode turns off before the far bubbles would run off the edge of the screen.
The left and right sides toggle independently, depending on the free space during horizontal scrolling.
The near bubbles take priority: the far column is only used where bubbles start to overlap. The far bubbles keep the line straight, while the near ones spread apart slightly so the line passes between them.
If "Stretch side bubbles" is off, both columns are at minimum width and hug closer to the ribbon.

settings.canvas_ribbon.aside_stretch_hin:

If disabled, bubbles are always at minimum width

translation.composition.variables_help:
bubbles - list of all bubbles

bubble fields:
id - unique bubble ID
img_idx - page index
img_u - bubble X coordinate on the page (0..1)
img_v - bubble Y coordinate on the page (0..1)
side - page side (left/right)
text - bubble translation
original_text - original text
translation_status - translation status
is_known_character - known character (true/false)
character_name - character name
clarification - clarification
bubble_order - line order within the page

Example:
{% for bubble in bubbles %}
{{ bubble.id }} | {{ bubble.img_idx }} | {{ bubble.bubble_order }} | {{ bubble.original_text }} | {{ bubble.text }}
{% endfor %}
